name: advanced_testing_patterns_v1
description: Advanced testing methodologies including property-based testing, integration testing patterns, chaos engineering, test automation frameworks, and quality assurance practices for robust software testing strategies

entries.notes: Advanced testing patterns: property-based testing, integration testing, chaos engineering, test automation
Testing anti-patterns: insufficient coverage, flaky tests, manual testing reliance, poor test design

provenance.review_notes: Advanced testing patterns applicable to comprehensive quality assurance across all software development domains

intent: Teach developers advanced testing techniques and quality assurance practices to build reliable, well-tested software systems with comprehensive test coverage and robust validation
